name: Pragma Platform
description: Backend game engine for live-service titles providing accounts, parties, matchmaking, inventory, progression and economy services.

seo.title: Pragma Platform — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Pragma Platform: Backend game engine for live-service titles providing accounts, parties, matchmaking, inventory, progression and economy services.

when_to_use: Live-service game backend for matchmaking and player economy
Progression, inventory, and party systems for AAA game studios
Backend engine for live games with account management APIs
Commercial game backend for studios needing enterprise SLA
Reducing custom backend code for multiplayer game features

cons: Enterprise pricing only, no indie tier
review.verdict: Premium live-service backend for serious studios, but completely out of reach for indie budgets.
review.best_for: AAA and serious mid-size studios building live-service games with complex progression systems
review.not_for: Indie studios, casual games, or anyone wanting transparent self-serve pricing
